utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , well , you did not know Chi Chi .

utterances.speaker: All
utterances.text: Yeah ! We promise ! We will be good !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Chandler ? Do you promise to be good ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You can come in , but your filter ... tipped little buddy has to stay outside !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Dear Ms . Buffay . Thank you for calling attention to our error . We have credited your account with five hundred dollars .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: We are sorry for the inconvenience , and hope you will accept this football phone ... as our free gift . Do you believe this ? ! Now I have a thousand dollars , and a football phone !

emotion_cause.span: 9_Now I have a thousand dollars , and a football phone !
